title: Sword of the Traveler and Skint
description: Mod adds a traveler's sword and a skint from the LetsPlay of YouTuber Lololoshka
body:
Mod adds 4 types of skints and a traveler's sword, mod also adds 6 crafts and a mythril ingot

Abilities: The traveler's sword makes a jerk in the direction of your gaze when you right-click (it is recommended to look up, then you can fly up for a while)
The crystal of skint can be placed on the ground

Everything said is shown in the pictures
